title: Install, Scope, Package, and Govern Skills · Threat Case: Governance
summary: Move a proven local skill into a team-distributed package. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext governance increment in a distributable skill plugin. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define ownership, approval, updates, disablement, and deprecation for shared skills.
Configure explicit or implicit invocation policy and declared dependencies.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Governance evidence
steps.instruction: Append a agent-ext-governance-167xf0: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Governance into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
agent-ext-governance-167xf0:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
